The '''automated repair droid''', also known as the '''vehicle repair station''', was an on-the-spot repair facility for combat situations produced by [[Loratus Manufacturing]]. The droid was equipped with a variety of tools to allow repairs of nearly any vehicle. When placed strategically on the battlefield, it provided patch jobs for vehicles that only had time for a quick fix. [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Mobile Defense Unit]]s were also able to support automated repair droids.

{{Droid-stub}}
